title: Kalshi rolls out Midterm Hubs ahead of the November elections in the U.S.
summary: The prediction markets platform seeks to position itself as the primary source for election odds ahead of the midterm elections this year.

title: Midnight token rebounds 19% after Wanchain bridge hack, Hoskinson calls for ZK revamp
summary: Charles Hoskinson says the exploit, which briefly sent NIGHT to an all-time low, underscores why the industry needs to move beyond legacy bridge infrastructure.

title: Here's why bitcoin bulls should take a closer look at interest rates
SecondFi to shut down after $2.4 million ADA wallet theft
summary: The breach stemmed from a vulnerability in transaction signing software that enabled the derivation of private keys from blockchain transaction data.

title: Bitcoin retreats from one-month high as oil tops $85, inflation concerns resurface
summary: BTC retreated from a one-month high as WTI crude topped $85 for the first time since June, reigniting inflation concerns and pushing investors toward gold, silver and the safety of bitcoin over altcoins.
